remaining_tasks.name: Test remaining categories on live site: Chassis, Exterior, Interior, Forced Induction, Exhaust, etc.
Test section photo flow: add mod with photo → mod detail → Set as [Group] → verify build sheet shows it
Test build sheet photo picker: tap placeholder → picker opens → pick photo → build sheet updates

Review title/placeholder suggestions in TuningAddPage — some may need tuning based on real-world use
remaining_tasks.notes: User mentioned small changes to recommendations may be needed after testing

decisions.decision: Section photo moved to full-width hero at top of each group, not side-by-side with mod list
decisions.rationale: Side-by-side breaks on long lists (17+ Engine mods) — photo stranded mid-scroll; hero layout works at any list length and supports any aspect ratio

decisions.decision: Lightbox shows Change button, 'Change' overlay removed from the build sheet photo itself
decisions.rationale: Tap-to-view is the expected interaction (Facebook pattern); Change is a secondary action that lives inside the expanded view. Also prepares correctly for public profile where Change should be absent.

decisions.decision: Collapse threshold = 5 mods before '— N more —' appears
decisions.rationale: Keeps sections readable without overwhelming scroll; power users with large builds still see everything via expand

decisions.decision: Brand subtitle removed from mod list rows
decisions.rationale: Title is supposed to carry the brand (e.g. 'HKS Timing Belt') — showing brand again below is redundant and looks odd

decisions.decision: Mod count removed from section headers
decisions.rationale: Editorial/zine aesthetic — magazines don't annotate counts. Clean label only.

decisions.decision: Magazine sheen is position:fixed (not scrolling with content)
decisions.rationale: Fixed light source feels like a physical magazine on the device — the sheen doesn't move as you scroll through content

next_action: Commit CLAUDE.md, then continue testing remaining categories on gdimension.app. Report bugs found and fix them.
context_notes: All code pushed to GitHub, Vercel auto-deployed. Build sheet completely redesigned this session. CLAUDE.md written as a cold-start context doc — should be committed. Engine category fully tested and working. Build sheet now has: section hero photos (full-width, tappable lightbox), overflow collapse, magazine sheen overlay (warm ellipse + grain), editorial section headers. Testing of other categories and the new photo interaction flows is next.
